title: Ubiquiti connector STP RJ45 with ground wire, Cat6, 8p8c, wire, pleated, AWG24
description: The UBNT TOUGHCable connector with shielding cable is a specially designed STP connector for UBNT TOUGHCablePRO (TC-L1), TOUGHCableCARRIER (TC-L2), or other AWG24 cable Detailed instructions how to crimp the cable you can find here GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
